content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "p-binary". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1225/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    min_val = min(a)
    max_val = max(a)
    ans = 0
    while min_val < max_val:
        min_val *= 2
        ans += 1
    print(ans)
